members.name: CanInstantiate
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the scene file has nodes.

members.name: GetState
members.summary: Returns the [SceneState] representing the scene file contents.

members.name: Instantiate
members.summary: Instantiates the scene's node hierarchy. Triggers child scene instantiation(s). Triggers a [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_SCENE_INSTANTIATED] notification on the root node.

members.name: Pack
members.summary: Packs the [param path] node, and all owned sub-nodes, into this [PackedScene]. Any existing data will be cleared. See [member Node.owner].

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_DISABLED
values.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], blocks edits to the scene state.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_INSTANCE
values.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN
values.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. Only the main scene should receive the main edit state. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN_INHERITED
values.summary: It's similar to [constant GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN], but for the case where the scene is being instantiated to be the base of another one. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_DISABLED
constants.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], blocks edits to the scene state.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_INSTANCE
constants.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN
constants.summary: If passed to [method instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. Only the main scene should receive the main edit state. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN_INHERITED
constants.summary: It's similar to [constant GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN], but for the case where the scene is being instantiated to be the base of another one. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.
